title: Enchanting Infuser: Add Treasure Enchantments
description: A datapack to make all treasure enchantments available in the advanced enchanting infuser.
body:
Adds treasure enchantments like mending to the [Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser). 

After installing the mod all enchantments should show up in the advanced infuser.

To use it in existing worlds you might need to enable the data pack with a command in chat: 

```
/datapack list
/datapack enable <datapack>
```

Datapack originally provided by Einhornyordle on [GitHub](https://github.com/Fuzss/enchantinginfuser/issues/118#issuecomment-2705478145) - thank you!

1.19.2 and earlier dont need this datapack: [Comment on GitHub](https://github.com/Fuzss/enchantinginfuser/issues/118#issuecomment-3135826262)

![Enchanting infuser with unlocked mending](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae41c0fef95736f1413ff136cdbe5162353edefb.png)
